positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene viewed through a stained-glass window effect. The main subject is a group of stylized woodland creatures—a curious fox, a gentle bear cub, and a playful owl—interacting with massive, glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and intertwined roots. The color palette is dominated by deep indigo, emerald green, and pops of warm gold and cyan, creating a magical, dreamlike contrast. The composition is centralized and symmetrical, designed for maximum impact on a t-shirt print. Style should emulate detailed, clean vector art mixed with gothic stained-glass geometry. Perfect line work, strong black outlines, and flat areas of contrasting color are essential. Cinematic, highly detailed, print-ready, no photorealism.
negative: blurry, photographic, text, watermark, logo, signature, copyright, dirty, noise, artifacts, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, out of frame, messy, unreadable
